sn20.3:1.2: “Just as families with many women and few men are easy for thieves & burglars to overpower,
sn20.3:1.3: in the same way, when a monk’s awareness-release through goodwill is undeveloped & uncultivated, he is easy for non-human beings to overpower.
sn20.3:1.4: “Just as families with few women and many men are hard for thieves & burglars to overpower,
sn20.3:1.5: in the same way, when a monk’s awareness-release through goodwill is developed, cultivated, handed the reins, taken as a basis, steadied, consolidated, & well-undertaken, he is hard for non-human beings to overpower.
sn20.3:1.7: ‘Our awareness-release through goodwill will be developed, cultivated, handed the reins, taken as a basis, steadied, consolidated, & well-undertaken.’
sn20.3:1.8: That’s how you should train yourselves.”
